Description: For one reason or another, this set of unworn Cosmic Exploration Initiative attire has been left to gather dust.
Mumukko didn't specify what this box contains─only that it must be given to Packingway at all costs.
Raw and unrefined, this material must be processed at a work station prior to assembly.
Masterfully processed by your hands, this building material is ready for assembly.
A mini rover's power source, despairingly depleted.
A mini rover's power source, newly replenished.
